🇨🇦 MADE IN CANADA 🧳 FOLDABLE

Foldable Acro Wedge

Sustain long jams and intense training sessions without the strain. This wedge corrects your pelvic tilt and cradles your lower back so you can base comfortably.

$119.00 CAD
Buy Now

Features

  • Smart Foldable Design: Packs completely flat in seconds to slide easily into your gear bag or travel suitcase.
  • Neoprene Cover: High-performance, sweat-resistant, and weather-proof outer skin that prevents slipping on gym floors or grass.
  • Dual-Layer Foam Core: High-density base layer protects against hard surfaces while a softer top layer cushions your spine.
